critical_issues.title: High Order Cancellation Rate
critical_issues.root_cause: 18 cancelled orders during the period (4.3% cancellation rate) with no documented reasons. Majority from dine-in orders suggesting service or kitchen issues.
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement mandatory cancellation reason tracking, train staff on order confirmation protocols, and implement a 'confirm before kitchen' step for dine-in orders

critical_issues.title: Excessive Kitchen Preparation Time
critical_issues.root_cause: Average kitchen time of 32.9 minutes with many orders exceeding 45 minutes (47 mins for takeaway on 2026-01-26, 48+ mins on multiple occasions). This indicates kitchen capacity issues or workflow inefficiencies.
critical_issues.impact: 15-20% customer satisfaction loss, potential revenue loss ₹250,000/month
critical_issues.recommendation: Analyze kitchen workflow, implement prep station optimization, add kitchen staff during peak hours (12-2 PM, 7-10 PM), and use KDS (Kitchen Display System) for better order management

critical_issues.title: Missing Kitchen Time Data for Recent Orders
critical_issues.root_cause: Orders from 2026-01-29 onwards have no kitchen_time_mins or completed_at timestamps, indicating tracking system failure or data integration issues
critical_issues.impact: Loss of operational visibility affecting efficiency improvements
critical_issues.recommendation: Immediately investigate POS/kitchen system integration, restore automated time tracking, and implement daily data quality checks

critical_issues.title: Inconsistent Order Numbering System
critical_issues.root_cause: Two different order numbering formats in use (date-based vs numeric), suggesting system migration or multiple POS terminals not synchronized
critical_issues.impact: Order tracking confusion, potential duplicate orders
critical_issues.recommendation: Standardize order numbering across all systems, audit for any duplicate orders, and ensure single source of truth for order management

critical_issues.title: Peak Hour Bottleneck
critical_issues.root_cause: Lunch (12-2 PM) and dinner (7-10 PM) showing significantly longer kitchen times, indicating insufficient capacity during peak periods
critical_issues.impact: 30% longer wait times during peak, customer dissatisfaction
critical_issues.recommendation: Add 2 additional kitchen staff during peak hours, implement advance prep protocols, and consider limiting concurrent orders during rush
